page-canvas.$description: Page Canvas — Page background, card-on-canvas, light text on dark surfaces — the warm white that carries the entire monochrome system

hairline-border.$description: Hairline Border — Dividers, card borders, image frames, icon outlines — the most-used stroke in the system, defines spatial structure

card-surface.$description: Card Surface — Elevated card backgrounds, secondary surface — sits one step above canvas to create grouping without shadow

divider-mid.$description: Divider Mid — Mid-tone dividers and section transitions

graphite.$description: Graphite — High-contrast neutral action fill for primary buttons on light surfaces.

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary body text, headings, icon strokes — slightly cooler than Graphite, reserved for typography not surfaces

pencil.$description: Pencil — Secondary body text, descriptions, subhead copy

faint-graphite.$description: Faint Graphite — Muted helper text, tertiary metadata, inactive nav items

inter.$description: System UI sans — nav, body, button, subhead, section headings. Weight 500 for body and controls, 600 for subheadings and nav emphasis, 700 for section headlines. Heavy negative tracking tightens the geometric forms at every size, giving the UI a compressed, technical feel.

instrument-serif.$description: Display-only serif for hero and editorial moments. Weight 400 with -0.025em tracking creates an italic-leaning elegance that contrasts Inter's industrial geometry — the signature move: a single serif word or phrase inside an otherwise sans-serif page, acting as visual punctuation rather than a heading style.

fragment-mono.$description: Accent mono for inline code-like elements, tag labels, and technical callouts. Used sparingly — appears in feature lists and inline annotations where the design tool wants to signal 'this is machine output'.

ui-monospace.$description: Micro-labels, keyboard shortcuts, and small technical annotations. System monospace fallback keeps it neutral.

sm.$value: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25) 0px 4px 4px -2px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px -4px 4px -2px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) -2px 0px 2px -2px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) -2px 0px 2px -2px inset

canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Base page background — warm off-white that carries the entire monochrome system

card.$description: Surface level 2: First elevation step — grouped content, feature tiles, subtle containers

dark-surface.$description: Surface level 3: Inverted surface for primary actions, active nav pills, segmented controls — the only high-contrast element
